'''Sidewa''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]], known to frequent [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] in the years leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. She was often accompanied by [[Honka]].<ref name="CSWE" />

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], when [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] stopped at the diner to ask [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]] about a [[Mk I Saberdart|weapon]], Sidewa was one of the customers, sitting in a booth with Honka.<ref name="SW2" />
